partner.name: h3.title
partner.notes: Angular SPA. Each .plan-wrapper contains: h3.title (plan name), .plan-banner (.size=GB number, span after=unit 'GB', .price=price digits like '34.9'), .plan-advantages (p tags = extras). Price is numeric only — the '₪ לחודש' label is in adjacent spans. wait_until=networkidle works. 5 plan cards found.

pelephone.name: .superlative
pelephone.notes: Legacy HTML page. Cards are .item.item1/.item2/etc inside .border_5 container. Price: .c contains numeric price (e.g. '39.90'), .d contains '₪' symbol, .e contains period label ('לחודש'). GB: .only_gb contains full string like '1000 GB' (also .a1=number, .a2='GB'). Name: .superlative. Extras are span elements with no class inside the item. .reg_price contains regular/after-promo price. wait_until=networkidle works. 5 plan items found (item1-item5).

hotmobile.name: h1.name
hotmobile.notes: Server-rendered HTML. Each card is .package-wrap.js-plan-filter containing an inner .container.plan{ID} div. Name: h1.name (e.g. '5G ULTRA ∙ 2500GB ∙ Plus Protect 2025'). Price: .current-price contains full string like '₪69.9' (symbol in .symbol span + number as text). GB: FIRST .feature-name that contains 'GB' — multiple .feature-name elements exist per card (some show minutes/SMS count). Extras: .list-item elements. Also .additional-info for extra features list. Cards are filtered by JS — default shows 3-4 featured plans. Additional plans shown via category filter buttons. wait_until=networkidle works. Price also has .old-price for crossed-out previous price.

cellcom.name: .package .header .title p
cellcom.notes:
SSR page (brand is Selcom/Cellcom). 3 plan cards found: 4G Basic (500GB, ₪44.9), 5G (800GB, ₪39.9 promo), 5G Pro Care (1500GB, ₪69.9). Card: .package with data-saletype='cellular' and id=SOC_*. Name+GB are BOTH in .header .title p — the

contains 'PlanName
NNNgb' so split on newline: line[0]=name, line[1]=GB. Price: .body-package .content innerText first line is full price string like '₪44.9'. Extras: .bottom-header .header-feature .text — repeated feature icons. Some cards have .benefit (top badge like 'כולל שירות תיקונים') and .banner (speed label). Regular/promo price note in .router-text. Use wait_until=domcontentloaded + wait_for_timeout(3000). UpgradeItemBlock elements are add-on services — NOT plan cards, ignore them.

mobile019.name: h3.title
mobile019.notes: Static WordPress-like page. Many .item elements (11 total): first 8 are regular plans, last 2 (.item.item_hor) are filtered Netfree plans. Filter with :not(.item_hor) for regular plans, or use .list .item. Name: h3.title (plan name like 'BIG DATA', 'לכל החיים'). Price: .price contains full text '₪39.90' — structured as ₪39.90 so .price innerText = full price string. GB: .blist li strong:first-child — first in benefits list contains GB amount (e.g. '300GB'). Extras: all .blist li items. wait_until=networkidle works.
